Dear Housing Officer,

I am writing in response to your housing benefit review letter dated March 4, 2026. I confirm my continued eligibility and request clarification on the required documentation.

Please advise which documents you need to complete the review. I am committed to providing all necessary information within the 14-day timeframe.

Thank you for your assistance.
